value: Thank you for reaching out. I understand you have two orders—one that's shipping today and another (order 20383180896770742) that's facing delays. I'd like to help get both sorted for you. Could you share the order number for the older order as well, so I can check the status of both and see what's happening with the delayed one? Once I have that, I'll look into what's causing the issue and get you an update right away.
